retrieved_result: Definition of workaround \"workaround\" - a method of accomplishing something that is otherwise prevented due to a bug. Clicking \"Verify archive\" directly crashes the program, but you can use the keyboard shortcut as a workaround. See more words with the same meaning: computer slang. Last edited on Nov 11 2011. Submitted by
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result defines 'workaround' and mentions software behavior but does not address debugging or integration of APIs; not relevant to the query.
